entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An approach to managing watershed resources holistically to enhance community participation.

entities.name: WATERSHED DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: A program designed for the development and improvement of watersheds.

entities.name: COMMUNITY
entities.description: The local population and stakeholders involved in the watershed management process.

entities.name: ENTRY POINT ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Initial activities used to introduce a program to the community and build rapport.

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE-BASED EPAS
entities.description: Entry point activities based on knowledge that ensure tangible economic benefits to build rapport more effectively.

entities.name: ECONOMIC BENEFITS
entities.description: Tangible financial or material gains provided to the community through specific activities.

entities.name: RAPPORT
entities.description: A relationship of mutual trust and understanding between the program implementers and the community.
